existing_features.title: In the footer component, change the text color of the bottom bar div (the 4th child div inside the footer's inner container, corresponding to XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/footer[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[4]/div[1]) to white (text-white). This is likely the copyright bar or bottom row of the footer.

projectName: Change footer copyright/bottom bar text to white
